item_specifications.special_feature: Chew-proof and Escapep-proof, Comfortable and Secure, Double Door Design, Easy to Clean, Easy to Move Around

about_item: 【STURDINESS: CHEW-PROOF & ESCAPE-PROOF】42-Inches 20-gauge steel and reinforced 0.6 inch diameter steel tubes. Much stronger than fine wire cages. This is a very sturdy large dog crate, even for strong, powerful and aggressive dogs.

【DURABILITY: Rust-proof & Anti-corrosion】It is made of corrosion-resistant and reinforced 0.5 inch diameter steel tubes.Multi-layered protective non-toxic coating keeps your dog healthy，suitable for most medium and large dogs. If you have a pet that suffers from separation anxiety, this metal dog crate is exactly what you need.

【Maneuverabiltiy: Four 360 degrees rolling casters】360-degree lockable rolling casters (2 lockable wheels) allow you to easily move the heavy duty dog kennel and they can be locked for better stability.

【Easy to Clean】The floor grate has a slide-out tray underneath, which allows for easy clean up. And the grate size is perfect,which can not only let the dog food and excrement fall,but also let your dog stand firm. Both of them are Removable.
【Easy to assemble】The extra large dog crate is already partially assembled. You just screw the parts together and it's done. Takes less than 10 minutes.

【MONEY BACK GURANTEE】 We always strive to give you the best quality dog crate for your baby dog and also pay more attention to your shopping feelings. If there is any problem with the dog kennel in 30 days, please contact us directly for a free replacement.

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy, Heavy, and Good Quality!
authors_reviews.text: Great sturdy kennel! It was quick to put together. Instructions weren’t super in depth but I got it put together by myself in about 30 minutes. The crate pan is under the grate so my dog can’t kick it out of the crate or tear it up - but it means you’ll want a mat or bed so pup isn’t laying directly on the grate itself (though it’s supportive enough to not be painful to walk on directly.) VERY heavy - package weight listed it over 70lbs - and strong metal bars. Two basic latches on the top hinged lid and the door and all other pieces bolted together. Does not fold, and check the dimensions - you may or may not be able to fit it through doorways after you put it together, so assemble it in place. It has wheels to make moving it easier, and two of the wheels have brakes to keep it frommoving while dog is crates. If you don’t want to use the wheels I’d attach furniture sliders underneath. It is big, and as far as aesthetics…I mean it’s a big tiger cage. It is what it is. But it certainly looks much better quality than the standard wire crates and my dog has not been able to escape it the way he can from the wire ones, so the function is great. I went with one of the cheapest options I could find for the size and sturdiness I needed and I’m not disappointed. It’s a great space to keep my new puppy safe from ingesting anything unsafe while I’m not home (and keep my house safe from my new puppy.)
authors_reviews.author: Alyssa

authors_reviews.title: Great kennel
authors_reviews.text: This kennel is perfect for big strong dogs. Extra large and sturdy. It’s also taller than other kennels. I love that my 75lbs dog can sit up strait. It’s heavy but very easy to assemble. It has wheels so it’s easy to move around. It folds up so you could travel with it if you have your strength to carry it. Absolutely 5 star product.
authors_reviews.author: Michael Conway

authors_reviews.title: Great Product and Service!
authors_reviews.text: The crate arrived very quickly. Assembly took a little time, but it was straightforward and easy to complete. The quality and size are excellent, and my puppy has plenty of space. She looks calm and comfortable while inside the crate.The only issue was that one of the plastic trays arrived with a broken corner. I immediately contacted the seller through Amazon, and they responded the very next day. Within five days, I received two replacement trays at no additional cost.The communication with the seller was outstanding, and the speed at which the issue was resolved truly impressed me. I greatly appreciate the responsibility and professionalism shown throughout this process.It was a pleasure doing business with you. Thank you again for your excellent service.
authors_reviews.author: José V

authors_reviews.title: Durability and size and comfort.
authors_reviews.text: Large enough and strong enough for a pit bulls or any larg dog. My dog is currently 1 year old and 55 lbs. She has used this since the day I brought her home! She loves it! She goes in and comes out when she wants to during the day. If I say time for nap or time for bed or tell her I have to go run errands, she trots right over to it and in it. She sleeps all night in it and never whines. It's her safe place. Very secure. It was worth the cost. Not easily transported. It's heavy as the materials are not flimsy wire. My daughter and I laughed so hard when it got put together because it looked big enough and strong enough for a small Ape. It has wheels so it's easily moved around.
authors_reviews.author: Laurie A Denton

authors_reviews.title: Very sturdy kennel!
authors_reviews.text: Very sturdy kennel! And I really love the double access point feature and the wheels that roll and lock. I did buy a pad so he didn't have to lay directly on the bars. Easy to clean though! The kennel is an odd size so it was a bit difficult to find a good pad for it. If anyone is looking Black Lab did fit well and has little plastic zip ties to secure it and for a good price. For reference, the dog is 95lbs in this picture and the person is 130ish. It's solid, just make sure you look at the recommend sizing.
authors_reviews.author: MHuller

authors_reviews.title: Perfect
authors_reviews.text: Sturdy material, easy to assemble, and spacious. My Blue loves it! It can be moved and positioned without any issues.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: High quality
authors_reviews.text: Finally! A crate my Pittie can’t break and it’s big enough.
authors_reviews.author: jonni angel

authors_reviews.title: Good and cozy
authors_reviews.text: I would love to give this product 5 stars, but I’ve been having trouble with the small metal piece holding the metal rack in place. I will need to improvise.Other than that, this cage has helped with my Dobermans anxiety, and mine too while I’m at work. I would still recommend this product for the value, sizes available, easy to clean.
authors_reviews.author: Erin McCarthy
